items.headline: TDIH: Paul Pierce's iconic 3-pointer vs. IND in 2003
items.description: On April 27, 2003, Paul Pierce showed TD Garden exactly what he got by nailing a 3-pointer to end the 3rd quarter vs. Indiana in 2003!

items.headline: Paolo Banchero's clutch 3-pointer in Game 3
items.description: Paolo Banchero knocks down a clutch three-pointer late to help seal the win in Game 3!

items.headline: Chasing History: Bane's Big Night
items.description: Orlando guard Desmond Bane tied Dennis Scott’s 31-year-old franchise record for most three-pointers made in a playoff game, hitting 7 against the Pistons in a Magic victory, putting his team up 2-1 in the series.

items.headline: Game Recap: Rockets 115, Lakers 96
items.description: The Rockets defeat the Lakers, 115-96, advancing the series to 3-1.

items.headline: Play of the Day: Payton Pritchard - Apr. 26
items.description: Play of the Day: Payton Pritchard - April 26, 2026
